category_sources: Official homepage describes Webdis as a fast HTTP interface for Redis.
source_facts.description says Webdis is a Redis HTTP interface with JSON output.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides the project documentation, feature list, install instructions, and HTTP API description.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/nicolasff/webdis; returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage documents Webdis as an HTTP server that forwards commands to Redis and returns formatted replies.
source_facts.description supports Redis, HTTP interface, and JSON tags.
